wordplay_note: Arnie Kott's mistress who becomes involved with Jack Bohlen
card_description: Doreen Anderton is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Martian Time-Slip*. Woman caught between the corrupt boss and the decent repairman. Name note: Arnie Kott's mistress who becomes involved with Jack Bohlen. The woman as contested territory between male power structures. First appears in *Martian Time-Slip*.

reference.brief: Woman caught between the corrupt boss and the decent repairman
reference.significance: The woman as contested territory between male power structures
